name: SolGold PLC
description: SolGold plc is an emerging copper-gold major focused on the discovery, definition, and development of its mineral deposits, primarily in Ecuador. The company is currently advancing the world-class Cascabel Project, which includes the large-scale Alpala copper-gold deposit and the Tandayama-América deposit. With a commitment to responsible and sustainable mining, SolGold aims to support Ecuador's emergence as a significant copper jurisdiction. Following a strategic transition, the company is now headquartered in Switzerland, leveraging global mining expertise to advance its projects toward long-term production and contribute to the global transition toward a lower-carbon future.
